heading: ***WIND ADVISORY FOR NY AND VT EXCEPT THE CT VALLEY FROM ORANGE COUNTY SOUTH THROUGH THIS EVENING******FLOOD WATCH FOR THE WHITE MOUNTAIN REGION IN NH THIS AFTERNOON AND EVENING***Today
text: Occasional rain and showers. A chance of afternoon thunderstorms. Highs in the 60s to near 70 east and north of I-89, in the 70s west and south. Winds increasing from the south and southeast 15 to 30 mph, gusting 35 to 50 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Rain and showers, possibly an evening thunderstorm, tapering off. Some partial clearing. Lows in the 50s. Winds becoming southwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Morning clouds breaking for periods of sunshine. More afternoon clouds north, with a rising chance of showers or thunderstorms, becoming likely near and north of the Quebec border. Highs in the upper 60s to low 70s north, 70s in the Champlain Valley and south. Winds west 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.

heading: Juneteenth
text: Morning clouds breaking for periods of sunshine. More afternoon clouds north, with a rising chance of showers or thunderstorms, becoming likely near and north of the Quebec border. Highs in the upper 60s to low 70s north, 70s in the Champlain Valley and south. Winds west 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph.
